title: Surgeon Vacancy at Alkem Laboratories - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Alkem Laboratories - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Alkem Laboratories has an exciting opening for a Surgeon at our Hyderabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Alkem Laboratories:
Alkem Laboratories is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Alkem Laboratories!
